children.text: Title: The Secret Garden. Writer: Frances Hodgson Burnett.
children.cn: 书名：《秘密花园》。作者：弗朗西丝·霍奇森·伯内特。

children.text: Mary was a 10-year-old girl. She lost her parents and had to live with her uncle.
children.cn: 玛丽是一个10岁的女孩。她失去了父母，不得不和她的叔叔住在一起。
children.statement: 玛丽和她的父母住在一起。
children.explanation: 文中说 'She lost her parents'（她失去了父母）。

children.text: But her uncle was often away. Her cousin Colin was ill in bed.
children.cn: 但她的叔叔经常不在家。她的表弟柯林卧病在床。
children.statement: 柯林是玛丽的表弟，他生病了。
children.explanation: 文中提到 'Her cousin Colin was ill in bed'。

children.text: Mary didn't care about others and was often angry. She was unhappy in the new place.
children.cn: 玛丽不关心他人，而且经常生气。她在新地方过得不开心。
children.statement: 玛丽一开始是一个非常友好开朗的女孩。
children.explanation: 文中说她 'didn't care about others'（不关心他人）且 'unhappy'（不开心）。

children.text: One day she found an old garden. There she met a new friend. His name was Dickon.
children.cn: 一天，她发现了一个旧花园。在那里她遇到了一个新朋友。他的名字叫狄肯。
children.statement: 玛丽在花园里遇到了狄肯。
children.explanation: 文中说 'There she met a new friend. His name was Dickon'。

children.text: They worked together to bring the garden back to life.
children.cn: 他们一起努力让花园恢复生机。
children.statement: 玛丽和狄肯一起照顾花园。
children.explanation: 文中说 'They worked together to bring the garden back to life'。

children.text: Mary slowly became friendly and kind. She also helped Colin to get well.
children.cn: 玛丽慢慢变得友好且善良。她还帮助柯林康复了。
children.statement: 在照顾花园的过程中，玛丽的性格发生了变化。
children.explanation: 文中提到她慢慢变得 'friendly and kind'。

children.text: I give the book 9 out of 10. It's a great book about friends, love and nature.
children.cn: 我给这本书打9分（满分10分）。这是一本关于朋友、爱和大自然的伟大的书。
children.explanation: 评分高达9分，并称其为 'great book'。
